data.name: Office Intrigue
data.detailed_description:
。

你的老闆 Victoria 是個霸道又無情的女人，她要求你完全服從她。她的命令越來越讓人感到羞辱，看似平凡的辦公室卻隱藏著不可告人的秘密。她的同事 Jake 知道的比他說的更多，但他不安的眼神暗示您可能是下一個受害者。您能承受壓力，還是屈服於他們的意志？

主要特色：

First Person Gameplay: 透過主角的眼睛體驗每一刻。
Quality Animations: 享受細膩且高品質的性愛動畫。
Suspenseful Story: 探索充滿神秘和道德困境的黑暗情節。
Realistic Graphics: 詳細的辦公室場景營造出令人驚恐的可信氛圍。

。

data.short_description: Office Intrigue 是一款情色第一人稱遊戲，將帶您進入充滿秘密與神秘的辦公室。您是剛在辦公室找到工作的新人，但從第一天開始，您就會發現這裡的規則非常不同。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon R9 380
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Office Intrigue
data.detailed_description:
Your boss, Victoria, is an overbearing and ruthless woman who demands total obedience. Her orders are increasingly humiliating, and the seemingly ordinary office hides dark secrets. Her coworker Jake knows more than he's letting on, but his troubled gaze hints that you may be the next victim. Can you withstand the pressure, or will you succumb to their will?

Key Features:

First Person Gameplay: Experience every moment through the eyes of the protagonist.
Quality Animations: Enjoy detailed and high quality sex animations.
Suspenseful Story: Explore a dark plot full of mysteries and moral dilemmas.
Realistic Graphics: Detailed office scenes create a frighteningly believable atmosphere.
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Office Intrigue is an erotic first-person game that will draw you into an office full of secrets and mysteries. You are a newcomer who just got a job in the office, but from the first days you realize that there are very different rules here.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon R9 380
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • Processor: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
